segments.text: That's around when Luigi players really started exploring what the character could do
segments.original_text: それくらいにルイージ使いの人の開拓が進んで

segments.text: Beyond throw combos, the KO percents after you've racked up some damage
segments.original_text: 投げコン以外にもダメージを蓄積した後の撃墜パーセントが

segments.text: can be targeted pretty consistently with fair
segments.original_text: 空前で狙えるパターンがかなり多いですね

segments.text: The moment that up tilt hit both times
I didn't think it would work, but
segments.original_text: いやまさかねと思ったんですけど

segments.text: they scooped them with the double jump
segments.original_text: ダブルアップで拾っていったと

segments.text: And that's exactly why it worked
segments.original_text: まさか起こしてくれるからこそ

segments.text: Luigi players' development of the character has really progressed
segments.original_text: ルイージ使いの人の開拓が進んで

full_text: That's around when Luigi players really started exploring what the character could do. Beyond throw combos, the KO percents after you've racked up some damage can be targeted pretty consistently with fair. The moment that up tilt hit both times I didn't think it would work, but they scooped them with the double jump. And that's exactly why it worked. But here's the thing, Luigi players' development of the character has really progressed.

corrections.original: ルイディエノを使っている人
corrections.rule: misheard: ルイディエノ→ルイージ

corrections.original: ルイディエノを使っている人
